reviews.review_title: Get me a unbanned I did not know
reviews.review_description: So here's what happened I was playing an infection lobby in I just jumped down from tutorial and there was a moderator and I had turned on mosa speed boost thinking it's not bannable and when I turned it on he reported me 18 times and I still did not get banned but then he reported me for the 19th time and I got banned Please unban me I will change this rating from a one star to a five star if you get me un banned

developer_response.body: Hello you are unbanned but please join the discord next time! - Kokuri

reviews.review_description: I got banned for absolutely nothing. I was in a room with a lot of people in infection, and people started reporting me for using mosa speed boost. I didn't know that I wasn't supposed to use it, and no one told me not to. If it's part of the game, why aren't we able to use it. Take it out of the game. Or better yet, shut this game down. No one likes it anyway. STAFF SUCKS TOO!

developer_response.body:
Insulting the staff doesnt help your case.

We try our best and we are human... you understand we have changed rules, some things like speed boost are banned and for good reason, its a huge unfair advantage. and the community normally helps by telling players the game is bad even though the rules are to be followed
